content.text: 내가 vscode 사용중인데 어케하노 개발에 도움되는 확장 이름 알려줘

content.thinking: The user is asking about helpful VSCode extensions for development. They're using Korean. Let me provide some useful VSCode extensions.

content.text:
개발 분야마다 다르긴 한데, 일반적으로 많이 쓰는 거 알려드릴게요:

## 필수급

- **GitLens** — git blame, history 등 git 기능 강화
- **Prettier** — 코드 자동 포맷팅
- **ESLint** — JS/TS 코드 품질 검사
- **Error Lens** — 에러를 코드 옆에 바로 표시

## 생산성

- **Auto Rename Tag** — HTML 태그 양쪽 동시 수정
- **Path Intellisense** — 파일 경로 자동완성
- **Bracket Pair Colorizer** (최신 VSCode는 내장) — 괄호 색상 구분
- **TODO Highlight** — TODO 주석 강조

## 언어별

| 언어 | 추천 확장 |
|------|----------|
| Python | Pylance, Python |
| JS/TS | TypeScript Vue Plugin, ES7 Snippets |
| Go | Go (공식) |
| Rust | rust-analyzer |
| Java | Extension Pack for Java |

## 테마/UI

- **One Dark Pro** — 인기 다크 테마
- **Material Icon Theme** — 파일 아이콘

---

어떤 언어나 프레임워크 쓰세요? 그에 맞게 더 구체적으로 알려드릴게요.
설치 해줘

content.thinking:
The user wants me to install VSCode extensions. I can do this using the `code --install-extension` command via Bash.

But wait - they didn't specify which ones they want. I should ask which ones they want to install, or I could ask if they want all of them. Let me ask which ones they want since there are many listed.

Actually, they said "설치 해줘" which means "install them" - referring to the extensions I listed. But installing all of them might not be appropriate since some are language-specific and I don't know what language they use. 

I should ask them to clarify which extensions they're interested in or what their development needs are so I can recommend the most relevant ones.

content.text:
어떤 언어/프레임워크 쓰세요? 그리고 전부 설치할까요, 아니면 특정 것만 할까요?

다 설치하면 언어별 확장까지 많아서 불필요한 것도 섞일 수 있어요.
전부

content.content:
Web search results for query: "OWCS Overwatch Champions Series 2025 2026"

Links: [{"title":"OWCS 2026 Season: Competitive Details - News - Overwatch","url":"https://overwatch.blizzard.com/en-us/news/24246297/owcs-2026-season-competitive-details/"},{"title":"Overwatch Champions Series 2025 World Finals - Liquipedia Overwatch Wiki","url":"https://liquipedia.net/overwatch/Overwatch_Champions_Series/2025/World_Finals"},{"title":"Overwatch Champions Series - Wikipedia","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Overwatch_Champions_Series"},{"title":"Overwatch Champions Series 2025 - NA Stage 3 - Liquipedia Overwatch Wiki","url":"https://liquipedia.net/overwatch/Overwatch_Champions_Series/2025/NA/Stage_3"},{"title":"Overwatch Esports 2026","url":"https://esports.overwatch.com/en-us/news/overwatch-esports-2026-announcement"},{"title":"Overwatch Esports","url":"https://esports.overwatch.com/en-us/news/owcs-2026-season-competitive-details"},{"title":"Overwatch Champions Series 2026 - NA Stage 1 - Liquipedia Overwatch Wiki","url":"https://liquipedia.net/overwatch/Overwatch_Champions_Series/2026/NA/Stage_1"},{"title":"Overwatch Champions Series 2025 Midseason Championship - Liquipedia Overwatch Wiki","url":"https://liquipedia.net/overwatch/Overwatch_Champions_Series/2025/Midseason_Championship"},{"title":"Overwatch Champions Series 2026: Schedule, Teams & Prize- Esports News","url":"https://esportsnews.co/overwatch-champions-series-2026/"},{"title":"Overwatch Champions Series - Overwatch Wiki","url":"https://overwatch.fandom.com/wiki/Overwatch_Champions_Series"}]

Based on my search results, here's comprehensive information about the OWCS (Overwatch Champions Series) for 2025 and 2026:

## OWCS 2025 Season

In 2025, OWCS built on the foundation of its inaugural year, with the goal of making the ecosystem more intuitive, accessible, and rewarding for everyone involved in Overwatch Esports. In NA and EMEA, teams could qualify into OWCS each stage directly through their region's FACEIT League, then compete through Promotion/Relegation to earn a spot in the Champions Series.

Regional Playoffs gave glory, prize money, and a spot at one of three international live events: Champions Clash, Midseason Championship, and OWCS World Finals. The 2025 World Finals culminated in a match between Twisted Minds and Al Qadsiah, where TM took a thrilling 4-1 victory to secure their title as 2025's OWCS World Champions.

## OWCS 2026 Season

The OWCS 2026 season will commence with regional stages across China, North America, EMEA, and Asia. Blizzard is bringing OWCS Partner Teams together in Seoul, South Korea for the first ever OWCS Pre-Season Bootcamp; an invite only program with a live event tournament at the end and designed to support competitive readiness ahead of OWCS Stage 1. The Pre-Season Bootcamp will run from February 8 through February 15, with training hosted at T1 Academy at T1 Headquarters in Seoul.

The OWCS Partner Program returns in 2026, bigger than ever. This upcoming year, Blizzard is expanding from nine teams to eleven, and on top of that will be adding OWCS China Teams to the official Partner Program.

OWCS 2026 will feature three live international events: Tokyo Champions Clash (May), Riyadh Midseason (July-Aug), and China World Finals (Dec).

results:
Based on my search results, here's comprehensive information about the OWCS (Overwatch Champions Series) for 2025 and 2026:

## OWCS 2025 Season

In 2025, OWCS built on the foundation of its inaugural year, with the goal of making the ecosystem more intuitive, accessible, and rewarding for everyone involved in Overwatch Esports. In NA and EMEA, teams could qualify into OWCS each stage directly through their region's FACEIT League, then compete through Promotion/Relegation to earn a spot in the Champions Series.

Regional Playoffs gave glory, prize money, and a spot at one of three international live events: Champions Clash, Midseason Championship, and OWCS World Finals. The 2025 World Finals culminated in a match between Twisted Minds and Al Qadsiah, where TM took a thrilling 4-1 victory to secure their title as 2025's OWCS World Champions.

## OWCS 2026 Season

The OWCS 2026 season will commence with regional stages across China, North America, EMEA, and Asia. Blizzard is bringing OWCS Partner Teams together in Seoul, South Korea for the first ever OWCS Pre-Season Bootcamp; an invite only program with a live event tournament at the end and designed to support competitive readiness ahead of OWCS Stage 1. The Pre-Season Bootcamp will run from February 8 through February 15, with training hosted at T1 Academy at T1 Headquarters in Seoul.

The OWCS Partner Program returns in 2026, bigger than ever. This upcoming year, Blizzard is expanding from nine teams to eleven, and on top of that will be adding OWCS China Teams to the official Partner Program.

OWCS 2026 will feature three live international events: Tokyo Champions Clash (May), Riyadh Midseason (July-Aug), and China World Finals (Dec).

Based on the web search results, here's comprehensive information about OWCS 2026:

## Prize Pool

Each stage will feature a $75,000 USD prize pool (for a combined $150,000 USD across NA and EMEA) split among six teams. These stage prize pools will be $25,000 lighter than the 2025 season.

## Schedule

The Regular Season kicks off on March 21 at 10 a.m. PT for the North American (NA) and Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) regions. Stage 1's regular season in NA and EMEA runs across three weekends of play, March 21-22, March 28-29, and April 4-5. Stage 1 Playoffs run from Apr 10-12, where a 4-team, double-elim bracket will decide each region's Champions Clash teams.

## Regions

The OWCS 2026 season will commence with regional stages across China, North America, EMEA, and Asia.

## Teams

**North America:** Spacestation Gaming, Team Liquid, Dallas Fuel, Disguised, Lunex Gaming, and Gorilla's Disciples.

**EMEA:** Virtus.pro, Team Peps, Anyone's Legend, Geekay Esports, Al Qadsiah, and Twisted Minds.

**Asia:** Korea, Japan, and the Pacific region will each compete in the Round Robin stage before advancing to the postseason. After the post season of each sub-region, the top 4 teams from Korea, top 3 teams from Japan, and the top team from the Pacific will qualify for the OWCS Asia tournament.

**Partner Teams:** The OWCS Partner Program returns in 2026, bigger than ever. This upcoming year, we're expanding from nine teams to eleven, and on top of that we will be adding OWCS China Teams to the official Partner Program.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Now I need to implement full JS functionality. Let me think about what features to add:

1. **Nav active state** - highlight current section in nav as user scrolls
2. **Smooth scroll** - already in CSS but let's make it work with the nav-cta button too
3. **"지금 시청하기" button** - open Overwatch esports stream (YouTube/Twitch) or show modal
4. **Stat counter animation** - numbers count up when visible
5. **Event cards click** - maybe show a modal with more info or navigate


6. **Region filter tabs** - filter/tab switching for regions
7. **Countdown timer** - countdown to next event (Champions Clash in May 2026)
8. **Nav scroll indicator** - progress bar at top
9. **Mobile menu** - hamburger menu for mobile
10. **Scroll to top button**
11. **Toast notifications** - when clicking buttons

I'll focus on the core interactions first: scroll-based nav highlighting and the number counter animations for stats, then build out the rest of the functionality.

content.text:
전체 JS 기능을 구현할게요. 추가할 것들:
- 숫자 카운터 애니메이션
- 다음 이벤트 카운트다운 타이머
- 스크롤 진행바
- Nav 활성 링크 하이라이트
- 모바일 햄버거 메뉴
- 지역 필터 탭
- 맨 위로 버튼
- 이벤트/버튼 클릭 토스트 알림
